case_title: ROXAS, ALBERTO P. et al VS BASADA, DAVID C. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROXAS, ALBERTO P. ROXAS, CAROLINA S. BASADA, FRANCIS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,035.00, MOTION TO AMMEND TO ALLEGE CLAIM AGAINST FRANCIS BASADA FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSED BY ENTERING APT IN VIOLATION OF S.F.
